name: attribute-reporting
description: Local Codex workflow for product attribute mapping, cohort analysis, HTML reporting, and evidence-backed correctness review.

interface.shortDescription: Map product attributes and turn cohort evidence into a locally reviewed HTML report.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native workflow for current-database retail evidence, centrally governed attribute mapping, preserved new-versus-rest and best-seller-versus-other comparisons, private HTML report authoring, and a direct evidence-backed correctness verdict. Fresh local scraping is available only in the app_files development runtime. Deterministic scripts own calculations, evidence bindings, rendering, and integrity checks; Codex agents own semantic mapping, narrative, and independent review. Plugin scripts never call a model API.
defaultPrompt: Use Attribute Reporting for this retailer and category.

Use the authenticated current-database snapshot by default; run a fresh local scrape only in the app_files development runtime. Preserve the existing cohort-comparison logic, write the report as private local HTML, and answer whether the report is correct.
Use Codex agents for semantic mapping, narrative, and independent review; never call a model API from plugin scripts.
